title: tabp run record
description: Per-run record written to <project>/.tabp/runs/<run-id>/run.json. Tracks execution status, usage, and metadata for a single screen-cvs run. Validated by tabp_helper.py (spec 02).

run_id.description: Unique run identifier, format: run-<ISO8601>. E.g. run-20260620T091530Z.

skill.description: Skill name that produced this run. E.g. 'screen-cvs'.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 datetime when the run started.

ended_at.description: ISO-8601 datetime when the run ended. Null while in_progress.

status.description: Current run status. in_progress means the run is resumable.

stop_reason.description: Reason the run stopped early. Null unless failed or interrupted.

state_write_mode.description: How state is written: 'helper' = tabp_helper.py shell subcommands; 'instructed' = coordinator instructed to write state files directly (Cowork degraded mode).

usage_source.description: Source of usage data: 'cowork' = Cowork self-reported; 'unavailable' = not self-reported.

tokens_in.description: Input token count. Null if usage_source is unavailable.

tokens_out.description: Output token count. Null if usage_source is unavailable.

cost_usd.description: Cost in USD. Null if usage_source is unavailable.

duration_seconds.description: Wall-clock duration of the run in seconds.

candidates_screened.description: Number of candidates screened in this run.

jd_slug.description: Job description slug identifying the role. E.g. 'backend-engineer'.

scorecard_file.description: Filename of the Excel scorecard produced by this run.
